• International destinations

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions about a package or need custom planning? Our travel experts are standing by.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your dream trip...

testimonials.title: Voices of Destinix
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from travelers who explored the world with our AI-guided intelligence.

about.heroSubtitle: Destinix was founded at the intersection of deep human passion and advanced machine intelligence. We engineer journeys that aren't just visited, but deeply felt.
about.valueCurationDesc: Our proprietary AI analyzes millions of data points to find your perfect match.
about.valueArchitectDesc: Every itinerary is human-vetted for safety, luxury, and cultural authenticity.
about.valueConciergeDesc: 24/7 dedicated support in every timezone, for any unexpected request.
about.valueEthicalDesc: We prioritize sustainable partnerships that give back to local communities.
about.techSyncDesc: Direct connection to global booking systems for zero-delay reservations.
about.techMoodDesc: AI that understands your travel vibe through visual and text preference analysis.
about.techRiskDesc: Advanced predictive alerts for health, safety, and logistical stability.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.
privacyPolicy.section1Body: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, travel preferences, booking details, and payment information.
privacyPolicy.section2Body: Your data helps us personalize recommendations, process bookings, provide customer support, and improve our AI-powered travel services.
privacyPolicy.section3Body: We implement strong technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access or misuse.
privacyPolicy.section4Body: We may use trusted third-party services such as payment gateways and analytics providers. These services operate under their own privacy policies.
privacyPolicy.section5Body: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data. You may contact us anytime for privacy-related requests.

bookingPage.title: Complete Your Booking
bookingPage.subtitle: Review your journey details and select any premium add-ons to enhance your experience.
bookingPage.addonFlightDesc: Business class upgrade with lounge access
bookingPage.addonCarDesc: Chauffeur driven luxury sedan for all transfers
bookingPage.addonBikeDesc: Premium mountain bikes for local exploration
bookingPage.addonHotelDesc: Upgrade to Presidential Suite with ocean view
bookingPage.addonActivitiesDesc: Skip-the-line access to all major attractions
bookingPage.termsLine1: 1. The rider must be at least 21 years of age and hold a valid driving license.
bookingPage.termsLine2: 2. A security deposit may be required at the time of pickup.
bookingPage.termsLine3: 3. The vehicle must be returned with the same fuel level as provided.
bookingPage.termsLine4: 4. Any damage to the vehicle during the rental period is the responsibility of the hirer.
bookingPage.termsLine5: 5. Insurance covers third-party liability only unless premium protection is selected.
bookingPage.termsLine6: 6. Late returns will incur additional hourly charges.
bookingPage.hotelSelectionOptional: Hotel Selection (Optional If Wants Private Stay)
bookingPage.eliteCareDesc: Comprehensive medical & trip cancellation coverage included.
bookingPage.confirmedMessage: Your adventure to {{destination}} is officially confirmed. A confirmation email with your receipt has been sent.
bookingPage.securityNote: Your payment is secured with 256-bit SSL encryption. Cancellation is free up to 48 hours before departure.
bookingPage.toastFillFlightDetails: Fill Up the Details Form First (Enter departure city & date!)
bookingPage.toastSaveFailed: Failed to save booking details. Please try again.
bookingPage.toastGenericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
